# Issue Labels

## Priority

| Label | Color     | Description                                      |
| ----- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `P0`  | `#e11d48` | Critical — system down or blocked, drop everything |
| `P1`  | `#f97316` | High — must be done this cycle                    |
| `P2`  | `#eab308` | Medium — should be done soon, not urgent          |
| `P3`  | `#3b82f6` | Low — nice to have, do when time allows           |
| `P4`  | `#6b7280` | Wishlist — someday/maybe, no commitment           |
